_comment: Manually-curated shows that were missing from the Google Calendar CSV export. Merged into shows.json by scripts/parse-show-history.js. Skipped: '2023-07-09 Prasenjit Das and Jimi' (Google Meet 1:1, not a show) and '2023-07-09 Bitcoin Consultation (tentative)' (coffee-shop meeting). For multi-day events, list only Day 1 and set 'days': N.
